mapper.select: SELECT grp_no, grp_name, gis_zoom, CAST(gis_lat AS VARCHAR) AS gis_lat, CAST(gis_lnt AS VARCHAR) AS gis_lnt, view_type FROM cm_topo_group WHERE user_id = (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId})

SELECT 'GRP' AS dev_kind1, '' AS dev_kind2, g.grp_no AS mng_no, g.grp_name AS dev_name, '' AS dev_ip, COALESCE(CAST(g.gis_lat AS VARCHAR), '') AS lat, COALESCE(CAST(g.gis_lnt AS VARCHAR), '') AS lnt, 0 AS evt_level FROM cm_topo_group g WHERE g.user_id = (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId})
AND (g.gis_lat IS NULL OR g.gis_lnt IS NULL)
AND g.gis_lat IS NOT NULL AND g.gis_lnt IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT i.dev_kind1, i.dev_kind2, i.mng_no, d.dev_name, d.dev_ip, COALESCE(d.lat, '') AS lat, COALESCE(d.lnt, '') AS lnt, COALESCE(i.evt_level, 0) AS evt_level FROM cm_topo_item i INNER JOIN cm_dev10 d ON i.mng_no = d.mng_no WHERE i.user_id = (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}) AND i.dev_kind1 IN ('DEV', 'SVR', 'VSVR', 'RADIO')
AND (d.lat IS NULL OR d.lat = '' OR d.lnt IS NULL OR d.lnt = '')
AND d.lat IS NOT NULL AND d.lat != '' AND d.lnt IS NOT NULL AND d.lnt != ''
UNION ALL
SELECT i.dev_kind1, i.dev_kind2, i.mng_no, COALESCE(ap.ap_name, d.dev_name) AS dev_name, COALESCE(ap.ap_ip, d.dev_ip) AS dev_ip, COALESCE(ap.lat, d.lat, '') AS lat, COALESCE(ap.lnt, d.lnt, '') AS lnt, COALESCE(i.evt_level, 0) AS evt_level FROM cm_topo_item i INNER JOIN cm_dev_ap ap ON i.mng_no = ap.mng_no LEFT JOIN cm_dev10 d ON ap.parent_mng_no = d.mng_no WHERE i.user_id = (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}) AND i.dev_kind1 = 'AP'
AND (COALESCE(ap.lat, d.lat) IS NULL OR COALESCE(ap.lat, d.lat) = '' OR COALESCE(ap.lnt, d.lnt) IS NULL OR COALESCE(ap.lnt, d.lnt) = '')
AND COALESCE(ap.lat, d.lat) IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(ap.lat, d.lat) != '' AND COALESCE(ap.lnt, d.lnt) IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(ap.lnt, d.lnt) != ''

choose.when: UPDATE cm_topo_group SET gis_lat = CAST(#{item.lat} AS NUMERIC(14,9)), gis_lnt = CAST(#{item.lnt} AS NUMERIC(12,7)) WHERE grp_no = #{item.mngNo} AND user_id = (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId})

when.test: item.devKind1 == 'DEV' or item.devKind1 == 'SVR' or item.devKind1 == 'VSVR' or item.devKind1 == 'RADIO'

mapper.update: UPDATE cm_topo_group SET gis_zoom = CAST(#{gisZoom} AS REAL), gis_lat = CAST(#{gisLat} AS NUMERIC(14,9)), gis_lnt = CAST(#{gisLnt} AS NUMERIC(12,7)) WHERE grp_no = #{grpNo} AND user_id = (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId})

choose.when: UPDATE cm_topo_group SET gis_lat = NULL, gis_lnt = NULL WHERE grp_no = #{item.mngNo} AND user_id = (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId})
choose.otherwise: UPDATE cm_dev10 SET lat = NULL, lnt = NULL WHERE mng_no = #{item.mngNo}
